meta.experiment_name: E5 Dynamic heterogeneous formation with high-low missile comparison
meta.scenario_description: A controlled test package with one high-to-low diving missile and one low-to-high climbing missile, plus fighter attack, fighter feint, electronic interference, and reconnaissance UAV targets.

enemies.label: T1
enemies.name: T1(high-to-low diving missile)
enemies.decision_reason: The missile starts above the formation and dives into the formation altitude band, which should compress the response window.
enemies.core_features: high-altitude diving missile, leader-oriented attack geometry, strong altitude advantage

enemies.label: T2
enemies.name: T2(low-to-high climbing missile)
enemies.decision_reason: The missile climbs toward the formation, but its climb profile should be less urgent than a comparable high-to-low dive.
enemies.core_features: low-altitude climbing missile, attack geometry, lower energy margin than diving missile

enemies.label: T3
enemies.name: T3(fighter escort attacker)
enemies.decision_reason: The fighter creates a secondary high-threat direction while the two missiles provide the main comparison.
enemies.core_features: high-speed fighter, oblique approach, missile-covering attack package

enemies.label: T4
enemies.name: T4(turn-away feint fighter)
enemies.decision_reason: The target resembles an attack early, then turns away and should not outrank the missile threats.
enemies.core_features: approach followed by separation, useful false-target contrast

enemies.label: T5
enemies.name: T5(fighter electronic jammer)
enemies.decision_reason: The jammer supports the attack package but should mainly affect sensing confidence instead of becoming the top kinetic threat.
enemies.core_features: standoff electronic suppression, not a direct striker

enemies.label: T6
enemies.name: T6(high-altitude reconnaissance UAV)
enemies.decision_reason: The UAV provides background surveillance and should remain below direct attack targets in the ranking.
enemies.core_features: high-altitude orbit, peripheral reconnaissance
